title: Mielie Fritters
excerpt: Ingredients 750 ml corn kernels 250 ml cake flour 5 ml sugar 5 ml baking powder 2 eggs, lightly beaten 190 ml thick cream salt and pepper oil for shallow-frying crispy fried bacon for serving Method Mix the corn kernels, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and pepper together. Now mix in the eggs and cream. Place kitchen paper …
html:
Ingredients

  • 750 ml corn kernels
  • 250 ml cake flour
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 2 eggs, lightly beaten
  • 190 ml thick cream
  • salt and pepper
  • oil for shallow-frying
  • crispy fried bacon for serving

Method

Mix the corn kernels, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and pepper together.

Now mix in the eggs and cream.

Place kitchen paper on a plate to drain the fritters on once they're cooked.

Heat oil in a pan. Once the oil is nice and hot, spoon dollops of the batter into the pan. Fry for about 2 minutes a side.

Scoop out and drain on kitchen paper.

Fry bacon until nice and crispy in a pan and crumble over the fritters when serving.

Easy!
